text: Morning Jarvis. What's my agenda for this Friday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, October 11. You have an architecture review at 11 AM, and pediatrician checkup for Lily.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Screen time is always a negotiation. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: I'm reviewing the secure messaging specs for Vertex Health. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has secure messaging. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Here is what I recommend. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping secure messaging in the MVP. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Looking over our mortgage options. The refi quote saves us about $250 a month. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. That's $3,000 annually. It could cover the Colorado trip or 529 plans. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, I'm reviewing the billing integration specs for Vertex Health. The database query on the patient onboarding schema is running very slow. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Good focus area. I recommend analyzing the query execution plan to see if a compound index can speed up patient onboarding. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. I can help with that. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick log: Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: I checked the telemetry feeds. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Great consistency with running. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Bedtime can be a challenge. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. VP Greg Holloway is complaining about the infrastructure costs for CareConnect. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Let's break this down. We can present a cost-benefit analysis showing that dropping these optimizations will cost more in support tickets. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Sarah and I are looking at home listings in Frisco online. They requested our W-2 and bank statements. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. Smart financial planning. I have prepared a checklist of documents in your shared folder. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: I'm reviewing the patient onboarding specs for Vertex Health. Our Twilio integration is throwing 400 rate limit errors during signups. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. I checked the recent logs for that. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. Great update. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Jarvis, Researching rover power systems in depth. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. I checked the telemetry feeds. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Reviewing my sleep tracker logs. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! That's good medical feedback. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Busy day at Vertex Health. Got document checklists ready for the mortgage refinance. Dealt with bedtime tantrums but made it through. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
